# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment

on: [push]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: 14

    - name: Install and run build script
      run: npm install && npm run build

    - name: Setup AWS credentials
      uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v1
      with:
        aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
        aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
        region: us-west-2

    - name: Deploy to Production
      uses: leonardomso/glcloud-ci@master
      with:
        project_id: my-project-id
        deployment: production
        bucket: my-bucket-name
        src_folder: ./build
